G0.label:
case cons
β : Type u_1
α : Type u_2
P : β → Prop
f : α → β
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : Any P (List.map f tail✝) ↔ Any (fun x => P (f x)) tail✝
⊢ Any P (List.map f (head✝ :: tail✝)) ↔ Any (fun x => P (f x)) (head✝ :: tail✝)

G1.label:
β : Type u_1
α : Type u_2
P : β → Prop
f : α → β
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : Any P (List.map f tail) ↔ Any (fun x => P (f x)) tail
⊢ Any P (List.map f (head :: tail)) ↔ Any (fun x => P (f x)) (head :: tail)
